name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: The Florida situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46515708:J9aRnqrNc:m:1:1349778030:3B524A4F9443F7FA1C76C7F51C645A1F:r)
---
| | | | Peter, The two most recent polls out of Florida show it to be an incredibly tight race: Donald Trump may be all the media wants to talk about, but Marco is closing in on him in Florida really fast. Every single vote is going to count. Some of the investments we've already made are paying off big-time: We made a push to get our most loyal supporters in Florida to the polls early, and sure enough, one poll that looked at early voters finds Marco crushing Trump. That's thousands of votes we already have banked, but there's still a huge amount of work we need to do in the week until Florida votes. Marco's going to win, and it's even more important than you might imagine: **Winning Florida will be a huge delegate haul for Marco, and it will be the single biggest step conservatives have taken toward denying Trump the nomination.** [**So go here right now to chip in for our Florida Victory Fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46515708:J9aRnqrNc:m:1:1349778030:3B524A4F9443F7FA1C76C7F51C645A1F:r) This isn't the first time Marco's come from behind in a Florida race, of course -- and not the first time he's done it by unmasking someone masquerading as a conservative. So this is territory we know, but organizing on the ground and fighting back against millions in attacks is not going to be cheap. It's well worth it, though: Marco is the only candidate who can stop Trump and unite the party, and he's certainly the only candidate who can do it in Florida. With a win in Florida, we'll be a big step closer to having a conservative nominee with a set of positive ideas and solutions that can beat Hillary in the fall. This is the home stretch in Florida. [**Make a secure donation of $15 right now to our Florida Victory Fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46515708:J9aRnqrNc:m:1:1349778030:3B524A4F9443F7FA1C76C7F51C645A1F:r) Thanks, Terry Sullivan P.S. One way we know that Marco's surging? Trump is now scrambling to air ads that recycle utterly discredited attacks on Marco that Charlie Crist tried, and failed, to stop Marco with in 2010. [**Will you help fill out Florida Victory Fund to fight back?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46515708:J9aRnqrNc:m:1:1349778030:3B524A4F9443F7FA1C76C7F51C645A1F:r)

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

From Michigan to
Mississippi, conservatives are uniting behind our campaign.
Yesterday Mississippi Governor Phil Bryant endorsed Ted Cruz to
be our next president, and it was announced that Chuck Norris
will join Ted on the campaign trail. We are seeing conservatives
across the political spectrum uniting together because they know
Ted is the candidate to bring together Republicans, to defeat
Donald Trump, and to beat Hillary and take back the White House
in November.

Hawaii, Idaho,
Michigan, and Mississippi vote today - and it's more evident now
than ever that this is effectively two-man race. For those who
think that Donald Trump's self-proclaimed flexibility would
easily compromise away our Bill of Rights, we invite you to join
our team - to stand with a trusted conservative who has spent his
life defending American's constitutional freedoms and who will do
the same as president.

We have an incredible
opportunity to stand together and to make this an election for
our kids and grandkids, so they grow up in a nation that's
stronger, more prosperous, and more free than ever.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: Rand Paul
subject: What makes Pakistan an ally?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

What makes Pakistan an ally?
Is it their imprisonment of Christians and
allies of America?
Or is it their funding of terrorism through
their military and intelligence apparatus?
If you can believe it, we know they do both
of these things that contradict American principles -- but the
United States government thinks we should continue to send them
millions in aid and sell them American military technology.
We're voting this week on halting all arm
sales to Pakistan. You know where I stand. Can I count on you to
stand with me?

>>STAND STRONG TO
HALT ARM SALES TO PAKISTAN<<

Over the last few years we have seen that
Pakistan is an uncertain ally when it comes to cooperating with
the United States.
As I travel in Kentucky, I meet countless
individuals who are struggling to survive in this economy -- and
we're supposed to tell those people that their hard earned
dollars should go overseas to a country contributing to
terrorism?
I don't think so.
We have no business sending hundreds of
millions of dollars overseas to Pakistan.
It's fueling terrorism, an arms race, and
it's fiscally irresponsible.
It threatens American security on every
level.
I'm standing strong to halt the sale of U.S.
arms to Pakistan.
But I'm counting on you to stand with me.
Please sign this petition and consider a
generous donation of $50, $25, or $10.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Dear Patriot:
There's an important issue facing the Senate
this week and I want you to know exactly how I'll vote.
I'm standing strong against the sale of U.S.
arms to Pakistan.
And I want you to stand strong with me by
signing this petition in support.
Keeping arms from Pakistan should be a no
brainer.
They imprison Christians and American allies.
They fund terrorism through both their military and intelligence
apparatus.
What on earth makes Pakistan an ally?
What on earth makes Pakistan deserving of
American military technology?

>>STAND STRONG TO
HALT ARM SALES TO PAKISTAN<<

As I travel in Kentucky, I meet countless
individuals who are struggling to survive in this economy.
And we're supposed to tell those people that
their hard earned dollars should go overseas to a country
contributing to terrorism?
I don't think so.
We have no business sending hundreds of
millions of dollars overseas to Pakistan.
It's fueling terrorism, an arms race, and
it's fiscally irresponsible.
It threatens American security on every
level.
I'm standing strong to halt the sale of U.S.
arms to Pakistan. But I'm counting on you to stand with me.
Please sign this petition and consider a
generous donation of $50, $25, or $10.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I want you to imagine a world
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Last night, Secretary Clinton said she was ready for this primary to be over, and if you listen to some of our friends in the political establishment and corporate media, it sounds like they're ready for the same.
Well, let me remind you of how many times they've told us our path was too difficult: in Iowa, they said it when we were down almost 50 points. And again when we were down 44 in New Hampshire, 28 in Colorado, and double digits in Minnesota.
**Today begins the most important seven-day stretch of our campaign:** tonight, Michigan votes. Next week, Illinois, Ohio, Florida, Missouri, and North Carolina follow suit.
If we continue to stand together and fight, what we are going to do in this next week is what we've done throughout this entire campaign: we are going to share our message with the American people, and we are going to shock the establishment. That is why I have to ask you directly:
[**Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before the polls close in Michigan tonight? It could be the difference in the coming elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full")
I want you to imagine a world eight years from now where nobody who works 40 hours a week lives in poverty, health care is a right for all Americans, kids of all backgrounds can go to college without crushing debt, there is no bank too big to fail, no banker too powerful to jail, and we've reclaimed our democracy from the billionaire class.
That is what our campaign is about, and why it is so important we keep fighting. Because if we do, we are going to win. That is why your contribution before the polls close tonight is so important.
[**Add your $3 contribution to our political revolution today and we will fight and win in the states ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full")
Real change comes about when large numbers of ordinary Americans speak, vote and get involved in the democratic process. If we stand together, we win. If we are divided, the big-money interests win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our_democracy?refcode=em160308v2-full")**

subject: Please vote
body:
| Peter \-- National Democrats are getting nervous about Ted Strickland's failing campaign. Leading Ohio newspapers have endorsed Ted's primary opponent, and fellow Democrats have called Ted "invisible" and a "ghost." Ted Strickland is hiding from his record and it's hard to blame him! On the flip side, when I win Florida, my campaign is a big step closer to taking on Hillary Clinton and winning. That's the stakes we have before us. If you want to stop Trump in Florida, and everywhere else, [**please give to our Florida Victory Fund right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46529607:6mSC24riN:m:1:1349778030:9AAB4E28FA128DBEC835348ED18B759C:r) [**Every dollar**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46529607:6mSC24riN:m:1:1349778030:9AAB4E28FA128DBEC835348ED18B759C:r) we receive is going to go to support our efforts in Florida.
